{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-59819", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 2.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:H/UI:N/VC:L/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-73", "name": "External Control of File Name or Path"}], "description": "### Impact

LiteLLM's `/health/test_connection` endpoint resolved request-supplied environment and OIDC file references in `litellm_params`. A proxy administrator, or another privileged caller with permission to test model connections, could cause LiteLLM to read files from the local filesystem via an `oidc/file/` reference.

Because exploitation requires privileged proxy access, this is treated as a defense-in-depth issue rather than a cross-tenant privilege bypass.

### Patches

The issue is fixed in `1.83.10-stable`.

LiteLLM recommend upgrading to `1.83.10-stable` or later.

### Workarounds

Restrict `/health/test_connection` access to trusted administrators only.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00258, "percentile": 0.17193}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-4g5m-c9r5-49xf", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-22T22:38:04Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4g5m-c9r5-49xf", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-4g5m-c9r5-49xf"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-59819"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-07-08T20:16:57Z", "published_at": "2026-07-22T22:38:04Z", "references": ["https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/security/advisories/GHSA-4g5m-c9r5-49xf", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-59819", "https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/25592", "https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/releases/tag/v1.83.10-stable", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4g5m-c9r5-49xf"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/BerriAI/litellm/security-advisories/GHSA-4g5m-c9r5-49xf", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm", "summary": "LiteLLM: Local file read via request-supplied OIDC file references", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-22T22:38:05Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-4g5m-c9r5-49xf", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.83.10", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "litellm"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.83.10"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: LiteLLM: Local file read via request-supplied OIDC file references
